name: Layla

passive.name: Malefic Gun
passive.description: Layla deals increased damage to enemies farther away from her (starting at 100% and increasing to 115% at 6 units away). This does not include Turrets.
passive.tips: Keep a long distance from your foe if you want to beat your foes easily. This is quiet useful for her by the way.

skill1.name: Malefic Bomb
skill1.description: Layla fires a Malefic Bomb in the target direction, dealing 200( +80% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to the first enemy hit (can Crit). Upon hitting an enemy, Layla's Basic Attacks and (Void Projectile) gain extra range for 3s, and she gains 60% extra Movement Speed that decays over 1.2s. The duration of the Movement Speed boost is doubled if an enemy hero is hit.
skill1.tips: This skill can shoot in a straight target. This is perfect if you want to slowly cut down your foe. But take note that you will need to use this skill wisely.

skill2.name: Void Projectile
skill2.description: Layla fires an orb of Malefic Energy at the target enemy that explodes on hit, dealing 170( +65% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to targets in the area and applying a (Magic Mark) on them for 3s. When Layla hits an enemy with a (Magic Mark), she deals 100( +35% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to nearby enemies and stuns them for 0.25s.
skill2.tips: The Range of this skill will surely increase whenever the skill is being upgraded. This is totally useful when you want to slow your opponent's movement speed when pursuing it.

ultimate.name: Destruction Rush
ultimate.description: Layla fires a blast of Malefic Energy in the target direction, dealing 500( +150% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to enemies in a line. (Passive:) The range of Layla's (Void Projectile) and Basic Attacks is increased by 0.6 units. Her sight range is also slightly increased each time this skill is upgraded.
ultimate.tips: The beams can go through walls or rocks. So this is useful if you are stealing your teammate's kills. Just joking. You can use this to reduce your foe's HP greatly. Whenever the skill is upgraded, its basic attack range or basic attack distance will be increased by 0.4%. Use this wisely.

matchupSystem.strongAgainstReason: Layla's relatively longer attack range lets her counter slow Tanks like Tigreal and Belerick.
matchupSystem.weakAgainstReason: Layla is countered by Assassins with high burst damage, such as Karina and Ling, as they can get the jump on Layla and melt her easily.
matchupSystem.synergyReason: Layla works best with Tanks that can protect backline heroes, such as Minsitthar and Belerick, since their protection gives Layla more opportunities to deal damage.

mechanicNote: Layla adalah marksman dengan DPS tinggi yang menjadi win condition utama di late game.

powerCurve.description: Layla is vulnerable early due to no mobility and needing items to convert range into real DPS, so she mostly farms and pokes safely. She comes online mid-game with first crit items, then becomes a late-game teamfight win condition as her long-range DPS and ultimate threat scale hard with full crit/penetration.

combos.name: TEAMFIGHT
combos.description: In teamfights, first use Layla's 1st Skill to increase the range of her 2nd Skill. With the extra range, she can easily apply marks to enemies. Use her Ultimate to detonate them all for a hefty bit of damage, and finish off with Basic Attacks.

combos.name: LANING
combos.description: In the laning phase, first use Layla's 2nd Skill to apply Magic Mark on the enemy, then detonate it with her 1st Skill for AOE damage while getting extra range for Basic Attacks to further harass the enemy from afar.
